store.name: Vellow
store._pricing_note: retail = max( cost*(1+profit_target+loss_provision_rate)/(1-gateway_fee_rate),  (cost + min_profit_per_unit + expected_chargeback_rate*chargeback_fee)/(1-gateway_fee_rate) ). The percentage path targets profit AND pre-funds returns/chargebacks; the absolute floor guarantees a dollar cushion even on near-free items. This makes the store profitable IN AGGREGATE. It cannot make any single chargeback impossible to lose on - use fraud screening (e.g. Stripe Radar) to keep chargeback_rate low.
